title: Trouble in Summer Paradise
original_title: Sommar och en jävla massa trubbel
overview: Sara falls in love with everything that moves with a pulse. She gives her heart to guys on toll too quickly. She is a hopeless romantic who believes that every new guy is "the right one." It only results in her being heartbroken every time. Eventually, her friends take her out into the archipelago for a summer camp. There she gets to work in the kitchen, where she meets Lisbet and another new love, the janitor's son. Sara's time at the camp makes her stronger and happier. It all seems to go well until the new owner of the facility comes and fires everyone and rebuilds it into a rich man's resort. It all gets worse when an ex-boyfriend of the worst kind is the son of a new owner.
